title: Phase 2 UI refresh: compact filters, sort, chips, and card hierarchy
description:
Context
Current search UX behaves like a debug console rather than a shopping workflow. This epic delivers the first visible Phase 2 slice and sets the interaction model users will rely on in daily usage.

Definition of done
- Search controls are compact and hierarchy-driven.
- Advanced filters are collapsed by default.
- Active filter chips and reset are available.
- Sorting is supported end-to-end.
- Results are product-first and score remains visible inline.

References
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/forms.py
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/views.py
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/templates/web/search.html
close_reason: All child UI tasks completed

title: Rework search controls and advanced filter layout
description:
Context
This task implements the core information architecture for the new search flow. It reduces cognitive load by emphasizing high-value controls and moving long-tail controls behind advanced interaction.

Definition of done
- Query/category/price/sort are always visible.
- Dimension filters are in collapsed More filters.
- Exact toggle behavior is explicit and validated.
- Keyboard and label semantics are accessible.

References
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/forms.py
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/templates/web/search.html
close_reason: Completed search control hierarchy with advanced filters and accessibility improvements

title: Add active-filter chips and reset behavior
description:
Context
Users need immediate visibility into all active constraints and one-click reset to return to a clean search state.

Definition of done
- Chips render for all active filters and use user-facing labels.
- Reset clears filters and restores clean URL state.
- Chip/reset behavior is tested at view/form level.

References
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/views.py
- tests/web/test_views_filters.py
close_reason: Implemented active-filter chip rendering and reset workflow in search UI

title: Add backend sort plumbing and SQL ordering modes
description:
Context
Sort is a critical quality-of-life control and must be wired from query parameters through retrieval SQL to deterministic ordering.

Definition of done
- Sort supports relevance, price asc/desc, and size.
- Retrieval ordering is deterministic with explicit tie-breakers.
- Query logging captures selected sort.

References
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/retrieval/repository.py
- sql/31_retrieval_candidates.sql
close_reason: Wired sort mode through forms, retrieval SQL ordering, and query logging

title: Redesign result cards and shortlist interaction flow
description:
Context
Current results read like debug output. This task transitions to product-first cards while preserving inline score visibility and reducing shortlist UI noise.

Definition of done
- Cards present clear name/price/key facts/category hierarchy.
- Semantic score remains visible inline by explicit preference.
- Shortlist notes are optional and hidden until requested.

References
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/templates/web/search.html
close_reason: Redesigned result cards with product-first hierarchy and optional shortlist notes

title: Phase 2 data foundation: parquet persistence and description-country rollup
description:
Context
Phase 2 requires durable intermediate data so iteration does not depend on rerunning expensive embedding jobs. This epic builds parquet-first persistence and market-aware description rollups that power the next embedding model.

Definition of done
- Raw/canonical/embedding data is available in parquet layout under data/parquet.
- Rollup table is created before Germany filtering.
- Country-partitioned loading paths are documented and tested.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- docs/pipeline.md
- docs/data/data_patterns.md
close_reason: Parquet and rollup data foundation completed

title: Add parquet artifact layout and export/load flow
description:
Context
We need durable data artifacts to iterate quickly without repeating expensive preprocessing and embedding workflows.

Definition of done
- Raw/canonical/embeddings parquet artifacts are generated under data/parquet.
- Country partitioning is present where relevant.
- Scripts and docs explain rebuild/reload mechanics.
- TODO for Git LFS is documented without enabling it now.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- scripts/load_ikea_data.sh
- docs/pipeline.md
close_reason: Added parquet export flow under data/parquet for raw/canonical/embeddings

title: Build product_description_country_rollup model before market filtering
description:
Context
We need a market-aware description layer keyed by product identity prior to Germany filtering, so embedding text can capture cross-market semantics deterministically.

Definition of done
- Rollup groups by product_id and exact trimmed description_text.
- countries are distinct sorted full names.
- country_count and source_row_count are included.
- deterministic ordering support is documented.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- sql/10_schema.sql
- sql/12_model_canonical.sql
close_reason: Added product description country rollup model before market filtering

title: Add rollup prevalence and anomaly profiling queries
description:
Context
High-cardinality description cases are common. We need repeatable profiling to track prevalence, detect anomalies, and guide future text-compaction decisions.

Definition of done
- Distribution queries for distinct description counts per product_id are added.
- Outlier sampling queries are available and documented.
- Results and usage notes are added to docs/data/data_patterns.md.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- docs/data/data_patterns.md
close_reason: Documented rollup prevalence and anomaly profiling queries with observed counts

title: Simplify embeddings: remove strategy system and replace with single market-aware input
description:
Context
The current strategy abstraction adds branching complexity across SQL, ingest, retrieval, and eval. This epic simplifies the architecture by removing strategy concepts and introducing one canonical embedding input path with market-aware description blocks.

Definition of done
- Strategy types, flags, and DB columns are removed.
- Single embedding input source is used by indexer.
- New text assembly rules are implemented (omit missing placeholders; include country/rating signals; include rollup descriptions).

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/ingest/index.py
- sql/21_embedding_inputs.sql
- sql/10_schema.sql
close_reason: Strategy removal and embedding simplification completed

title: Remove strategy from Python types and ingest/retrieval/eval interfaces
description:
Context
Strategy typing currently crosses module boundaries and amplifies complexity. This task removes strategy-bearing contracts so the rest of the simplification can proceed cleanly.

Definition of done
- EmbeddingStrategyVersion type is removed.
- strategy_version fields are removed from typed contracts.
- ingest/retrieval/eval call paths no longer pass strategy values.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/shared/types.py
- src/tal_maria_ikea/ingest/index.py
- src/tal_maria_ikea/eval/run.py
close_reason: Removed strategy type and fields from Python interfaces

title: Replace strategy view routing with single embedding_input source
description:
Context
v1/v2 view routing and CLI strategy flags are no longer needed. This task converges all indexing to one canonical embedding input source.

Definition of done
- ingest/text_strategy.py is removed.
- SQL provides one app.embedding_input view.
- index CLI/Makefile/docs remove strategy flag usage.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- sql/21_embedding_inputs.sql
- src/tal_maria_ikea/ingest/index.py
- Makefile
close_reason: Replaced strategy routing with single embedding_input source and CLI

title: Implement market-aware embedding text rules and rollup integration
description:
Context
Feedback requires richer and cleaner embedding text: no missing placeholders, additional country/rating signals, and market-aware rolled-up descriptions from pre-filter data.

Definition of done
- Missing attributes are omitted rather than serialized placeholders.
- country/rating/rating_count are included when present.
- Description rollup lines are appended with full country names.
- Ordering is deterministic across runs.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- sql/21_embedding_inputs.sql
- sql/12_model_canonical.sql
close_reason: Implemented market-aware embedding text and rollup description integration

title: Migrate embedding storage schema and run metadata to strategy-free model
description:
Context
Storage tables and repository upsert keys currently encode strategy dimensions. This task removes strategy columns and updates persistence interfaces so indexing remains correct and simpler.

Definition of done
- app.embedding_runs and app.product_embeddings no longer include strategy_version.
- PK/upsert logic is updated accordingly.
- Reset/migration behavior is documented and tested.

References
- sql/10_schema.sql
- src/tal_maria_ikea/ingest/repository.py
- docs/pipeline.md
close_reason: Migrated embedding storage and run metadata to strategy-free schema

title: Enrich catalog with IKEA image URL metadata
description:
## Context
We can deterministically map `canonical_product_key` to IKEA product page URL via `app.products_canonical.url`, but we cannot reliably derive final image filenames (for example `__1159535_pe888533_s5.jpg`) from product ID alone.

## Goal
Add a robust enrichment pipeline that resolves image URLs per product and stores them locally for UI use, without relying on on-demand scraping in request paths.

## How To (Implementation Plan)
1. Source rows from `app.products_canonical` for Germany (and later market-agnostic support) using `canonical_product_key`, `product_id`, `url`, and locale fields.
2. Fetch each product page with polite rate limiting, retries, and user-agent.
3. Parse image metadata in this order:
   - `meta[property="og:image"]` for primary image
   - `script[type="application/ld+json"]` -> `image[]` for gallery image URLs
   - fallback: parse gallery `img`/`srcset` if JSON-LD missing
4. Normalize and store:
   - `primary_image_url`
   - `image_urls` (array/json)
   - `image_count`
   - `image_source` (`og`, `jsonld`, `fallback`)
   - `fetched_at`, `http_status`, `parse_status`, `error_message`
5. Persist to a new table (for example `app.product_images`) keyed by `canonical_product_key` with idempotent upsert.
6. Add tests for parser robustness against HTML fixture variants and missing metadata cases.
7. Add CLI/script entrypoint for refresh backfills and incremental updates.
8. Add docs under `docs/data/` describing extraction rules, failure modes, and refresh cadence.

## Definition of Done
- Every Germany product with reachable URL has `primary_image_url` stored.
- Parser + integration tests cover `og:image`, JSON-LD, and fallback paths.
- Enrichment job is resumable/idempotent and logs failures with reason codes.
- Retrieval/UI can read stored image URLs without making external calls during request handling.

## Not Doing Now
This work is intentionally deferred. Do not pick it up until Tal explicitly unblocks it.

title: Bug: width/depth/height filters fail when canonical dimension columns are null
description:
Context
Search with min width (e.g. 10cm) can return no results even for obvious wardrobe queries because app.products_canonical currently has null width/depth/height values for many/all rows.

Definition of done
- Retrieval query uses resolved dimensions with fallback parsing from dimensions_text when structured columns are null.
- Width/depth/height filters work for affected rows.
- Regression test covers width filter with fallback path.

References
- sql/31_retrieval_candidates.sql
- src/tal_maria_ikea/retrieval/repository.py
- tests/retrieval/test_repository.py
close_reason: Fixed canonical dimension parsing and verified width filters now work

title: Phase2 UI follow-up: stats page, filter component polish, 3-column results, embedding text toggle
description:
Context
Post-implementation feedback requested a dedicated stats page and further UI polish for filters and results presentation. The current form still looks dense and results are single-column, while embedding text is not inspectable in UI.

Definition of done
- Add stats page showing total items and total vectors.
- Improve filter controls with labeled per-type components and clearer structure.
- Render results in three columns with row-major order.
- Add per-result toggle to view embedding text.

References
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
- src/tal_maria_ikea/web/templates/web/search.html
close_reason: Added stats page, polished filter components, 3-column results, and embedding text toggle

title: Align retrieval and logging with simplified embedding schema and new sort behavior
description:
Context
After embedding simplification, retrieval SQL and request logging must be updated to prevent regressions and ensure observability of new UI controls.

Definition of done
- Retrieval no longer depends on strategy fields.
- Sorting behavior is deterministic and fully wired.
- Query log captures sort mode and remains compatible with analysis workflows.

References
- sql/31_retrieval_candidates.sql
- src/tal_maria_ikea/retrieval/repository.py
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
close_reason: Retrieval and logging alignment completed

title: Remove strategy conditions from retrieval SQL and repository APIs
description:
Context
Retrieval currently filters embeddings by strategy_version; that path must be removed after storage simplification to prevent broken queries and stale call signatures.

Definition of done
- Retrieval SQL accepts no strategy parameter.
- Retrieval repository/service signatures are updated.
- Retrieval tests cover updated behavior.

References
- sql/31_retrieval_candidates.sql
- src/tal_maria_ikea/retrieval/repository.py
- src/tal_maria_ikea/retrieval/service.py
- tests/retrieval/test_repository.py
close_reason: Removed strategy constraints from retrieval SQL and repository interfaces

title: Extend query log schema to persist sort mode
description:
Context
Sort control is a new behavior and needs observability for analysis and debugging. Query logs must include this selection for post-hoc behavior review.

Definition of done
- query_log schema includes sort mode field.
- Log inserts persist selected sort value.
- docs include example analysis query by sort mode.

References
- sql/10_schema.sql
- src/tal_maria_ikea/retrieval/repository.py
- docs/pipeline.md
close_reason: Persisted and documented sort mode in query log

title: Bug: retrieval prepared statement parameter mismatch after keyword filter addition
description:
Context
After adding include/exclude keyword filters, GET requests can fail with Invalid Input Error saying prepared statement parameters 33-36 were not provided. This indicates SQL placeholders and repository parameter lists drifted out of sync.

Definition of done
- Placeholder count in sql/31_retrieval_candidates.sql matches repository params exactly.
- Reproduced failing request no longer errors.
- Regression test covers keyword filters and empty keyword values.

References
- src/tal_maria_ikea/retrieval/repository.py
- sql/31_retrieval_candidates.sql
- tests/retrieval/test_repository.py
close_reason: Aligned SQL params for keyword filters and added regression tests

title: Phase 2 cleanup: simplify eval schema, purge old eval data, and update docs
description:
Context
Phase 2 changes impact evaluation persistence and operational docs. We need a clean evaluation baseline, simplified eval schema, and updated runbooks so future work starts from coherent documentation.

Definition of done
- Eval schema/code no longer uses strategy fields.
- Existing eval data is removed and regeneration path is documented.
- Phase 2 documentation updates are complete and cross-linked.

References
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- docs/eval.md
- docs/pipeline.md
- docs/data/index.md
close_reason: Eval cleanup and docs updates completed

title: Remove strategy field from eval persistence and runtime
description:
Context
Eval remains part of the stack, but strategy-related fields now create needless complexity. This task keeps eval capabilities while aligning schema and code to the simplified architecture.

Definition of done
- eval_runs and eval code paths no longer use strategy_version.
- Eval tests and docs reflect updated schema.

References
- src/tal_maria_ikea/eval/run.py
- src/tal_maria_ikea/eval/repository.py
- sql/10_schema.sql
- docs/eval.md
close_reason: Removed strategy field from eval runtime and persistence paths

title: Purge existing eval data and document clean rebuild workflow
description:
Context
Existing eval data is tied to the old architecture and should be removed to avoid false baselines. We need a clean documented rebuild path for regenerated queries/labels/metrics.

Definition of done
- Existing eval rows are deleted as requested.
- Regeneration and relabeling flow is documented.
- Scope and intent of purge are explicit in docs.

References
- docs/eval.md
- Makefile
- scripts/run_eval.sh
close_reason: Purged current eval data and documented reset workflow

title: Update Phase 2 docs and runbooks across data/pipeline/web
description:
Context
The architectural simplification and UI changes alter operational expectations. Documentation must remain the source of truth for future contributors and agents.

Definition of done
- docs/pipeline.md, docs/web.md, docs/data/index.md, docs/data/data_patterns.md are updated.
- References to phase2 spec docs are included where relevant.
- Removed concepts are deleted from docs to avoid drift.

References
- spec/phase2/ui_critique.md
- spec/phase2/source_notes.md
- docs/pipeline.md
- docs/web.md
- docs/data/index.md
- docs/data/data_patterns.md
close_reason: Updated pipeline/web/data docs for phase2 architecture
